weighted_nipals_pls = function(X, Y, model, M, ncomp = NULL, thresh ){
C = matrix(1, ncol = ncol(X), nrow = nrow(X) )
if(any(is.na(Y))) missNAY = T else missNAY = F
CY = matrix(1, ncol = ncol(Y), nrow = nrow(Y) )
loadings = matrix(0, nrow = ncol(X), ncol = ncomp )
loadingsY = matrix(0, nrow = ncol(Y), ncol = ncomp )
weights = matrix(0, nrow = ncol(X), ncol = ncomp )
#Initiate the scores with the variable with the highest variance when there are no NAs with the one with least NAs instead
w_old = if(missNA) crossprod(X_sinNA%*%M, u_old)/drop(t(CY) %*% u_old^2) else crossprod(X%*%M, u_old)/drop(crossprod(u_old))
t_new = if(missNA) (X_sinNA %*% w_old) / (C %*% w_old^2)  else X %*% w_old
c_new = if(missNA)  crossprod(Y_sinNA, t_new) / (t(CY) %*% t_new^2)  else crossprod(Y, t_new)/drop(crossprod(t_new))
u_new = if(missNA) if(ncol(CY)==1) (Y_sinNA %*% c_new) / drop(t(c_new)%*%c_new) else (Y_sinNA %*% c_new) / (CY %*% c_new^2)  else (Y %*% c_new) / drop(crossprod(c_new))
p_new = if(missNA)  crossprod(X_sinNA, t_new)/(t(C) %*% t_new^2)  else crossprod(X, t_new)/drop(crossprod(t_new))
# Ver si usar el score de la iteración anterior en combinación con el de la nueva iteración con alguna regularización
t_new = if(missNA) (X_sinNA %*% w_new) / (C %*% w_new^2)  else X %*% w_new
c_new = if(missNA) crossprod(Y_sinNA, t_new) / (t(CY) %*% t_new^2)  else crossprod(Y, t_new)/drop(crossprod(t_new))
colnames(loadings) = colnames(scores)= colnames(scoresY)= colnames(loadingsY)= colnames(weights) = colnames(weightsStar) = paste0('p',1:ncomp)
return(list(scores=scores, loadings = loadings, scoresY=scoresY, loadingsY = loadingsY, weights = weights, weightsStar = weightsStar, coefficients = coefficients ))
